name: Strawberry Rhubarb Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 pound rhubarb, cut into 1-inch pieces, 3 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar, tapioca, salt, and nutmeg with the chopped rhubarb.
2. Add the sliced strawberries to the mixture.
3. Let the filling stand for 20 minutes.
4. Place a pastry-lined 9-inch pie pan on the baking sheet.
5. Pour the filling into the crust.
6. Dot the top of the filling with butter.
7. Cover the edges of the pie with the remaining pastry, cutting it into strips first.
8. Dot the top of the lattice with more butter.
9. Bake at 400°F for 35-45 minutes.
